selections.name: Jetway
selections.reason: Top connections with Sadler and Rosario. Showed strong early speed and finished a solid second last out at Santa Anita.

selections.name: Howie's Law
selections.reason: Doug O'Neill trainee making first start since August 2025. Excellent workouts indicate he is ready to fire fresh.

selections.name: Pharoah's Candy
selections.reason: First-time starter by American Pharoah. Working exceptionally well at Santa Anita for trainer Jeff Bonde.

selections.name: Elusive Con
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Showed tactical speed at Indiana Downs and fits well here.

danger_horse.name: Freddy Five Four
danger_horse.reason: Omaha Beach gelding who has faced tougher maiden special weight company in the past.

selections.name: Phone Booth
selections.reason: Highly regarded Pavel colt debuting for Doug O'Neill. Sharp bullet workouts on the morning tab.

selections.name: Goodtimesntanlines
selections.reason: Steve Knapp-trained Stay Thirsty colt drawing the rail. Showing plenty of early zip in morning drills.

selections.name: Scam Alert
selections.reason: The only runner with proven form, finishing a strong second last out with a solid 77 speed figure.

selections.name: Southwest Sun
selections.reason: Peter Miller first-time starter by Grazen. Miller excels with juvenile debutantes at Del Mar.

danger_horse.name: Little King
danger_horse.reason: Richard Barton homebred showing consistent gate works for trainer George Papaprodromou.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #5, Exacta Box 5-1, Trifecta 5 / 1,7 / ALL

selections.name: Motorious (gb)
selections.reason: Elite turf sprinter from the Phil D'Amato barn. Multiple graded stakes winner who loves the Del Mar turf course.

selections.name: Sumter
selections.reason: Classy veteran who was narrowly defeated in the Daytona G3. Possesses excellent tactical speed.

selections.name: Sorrento Sky (ire)
selections.reason: First start since being gelded. Phil D'Amato trainee with high-level European form and a strong late kick.

selections.name: Flyover
selections.reason: Riding a two-race win streak for Sadler. Rosario retains the mount on this rapidly improving sprinter.

danger_horse.name: Book Smart
danger_horse.reason: Consistent California-bred who always runs his race and gets the services of Mike Smith.

selections.name: Attack Now
selections.reason: Drops significantly into maiden claiming company. O'Neill/Jaramillo combo is highly potent here.

selections.name: Che (ire)
selections.reason: Consistent runner who finished a strong second last out at Los Alamitos. Fits perfectly at this level.

selections.name: Kiki Ride
selections.reason: Knocking on the door with multiple minor awards at Santa Anita. Ayuso knows the horse well.

selections.name: Cano For The Win
selections.reason: Drops from maiden special weight company. Has shown early speed that should play well at Del Mar.

danger_horse.name: Stage Run
danger_horse.reason: Finished second at this level two starts back and gets a positive jockey switch to Kyle Frey.

selections.name: Savage Warden
selections.reason: Phil D'Amato trainee who won impressively last out at Santa Anita, earning a massive 105 speed figure.

selections.name: Tiz All That
selections.reason: Extremely consistent runner who finished second in allowance optional claiming company last out.

selections.name: Sammy Davis
selections.reason: Sir Prancealot gelding with excellent tactical speed. Joel Rosario takes the mount for John Sadler.

selections.name: Caro Buono (fr)
selections.reason: First start since being gelded. European import with strong turf bloodlines and a powerful closing kick.

danger_horse.name: Zeus's Echo
danger_horse.reason: Finished a competitive second in allowance company at Churchill Downs before shipping west.

selections.name: Beneficial
selections.reason: Mullins trainee who won easily last out at Santa Anita. Retains Kyle Frey and looks like the class of the field.

selections.name: Hankering
selections.reason: Won last out at Santa Anita showing great determination. Belmont retains the mount for Papaprodromou.

selections.name: Harbor Code
selections.reason: Consistent performer dropping into claiming company. Draws well and gets Kazushi Kimura.

selections.name: Next Trick
selections.reason: Speed horse drawing the rail. Jaramillo will likely send him early to control the pace.

danger_horse.name: Typhoon Tommy
danger_horse.reason: Consistent board hitter who finished a solid third last out at Santa Anita.

selections.name: Positive Times
selections.reason: Extremely consistent maiden who has finished second in his last three starts. Deserves to break through.

selections.name: Lucky N Smart
selections.reason: Vronsky gelding making his first start in over two years. Workouts are outstanding for Carla Gaines.

selections.name: Sirnami
selections.reason: Finished a strong second last out at Santa Anita. Joel Rosario takes the mount for Mike Puype.

selections.name: Proof He Goes
selections.reason: Possesses blazing early speed. If left uncontested on the lead, he could steal it.

danger_horse.name: Still Bulletproof
danger_horse.reason: Finished second in his last start at Los Alamitos and has shown affinity for turf sprints.

selections.name: Gabriel's Gift
selections.reason: First-time starter by Straight Fire. Working lights out at San Luis Rey for trainer Richard Baltas.

selections.name: Here On Business
selections.reason: First start since being gelded. Ran a competitive fourth in debut at Santa Anita and should improve.

selections.name: Ford Frenzy
selections.reason: First-time starter by Bodexpress. Mark Glatt is highly successful with debuting juveniles.

selections.name: Tall Forest
selections.reason: Debuting colt by Forest Command. Gets the services of leading rider Juan Hernandez.

danger_horse.name: Delaneys Dreamer
danger_horse.reason: Finished second in his debut at Santa Anita showing good early speed.

selections.name: King Of Gosford (gb)
selections.reason: Elite turf miler who won a Grade 3 last out. Phil D'Amato and Umberto Rispoli are a deadly turf combination.

selections.name: First Peace
selections.reason: Multiple stakes winner with massive speed figures. Mike Smith retains the mount for Mark Glatt.

selections.name: Freedom's Not Free
selections.reason: Won the Daytona G3 last out in impressive fashion. Antonio Fresu rides for Mark Glatt.

selections.name: Mi Hermano Ramon
selections.reason: Extremely consistent graded stakes performer who always runs his race. Joel Rosario takes the mount.

danger_horse.name: Atitlan
danger_horse.reason: Finished a close second in the Del Mar Handicap G2 last summer and loves this turf course.

selections.name: Cruisin For Cali
selections.reason: Extremely consistent runner who finished second in his last start. Gets Juan Hernandez for Mike Puype.

selections.name: Chapter One
selections.reason: Dominated his last start at Santa Anita, winning by over nine lengths. Jaramillo rides for O'Neill.

selections.name: Letmein
selections.reason: Finished a strong second last out at Santa Anita. Abel Lezcano retains the mount for Mark Glatt.

selections.name: Here's Some More
selections.reason: Won his maiden in impressive fashion last out at Los Alamitos. McCarthy trainee with upside.

danger_horse.name: Got'm Cot'm
danger_horse.reason: Classy individual who has faced tougher optional claiming company in the past.

selections.name: Phosphorescence (fr)
selections.reason: Consistent turf runner who won at this level two starts back. McCarthy/Fresu combo is very strong.

selections.name: Zalamo (fr)
selections.reason: Won last out at Santa Anita with a powerful closing kick. Rispoli takes the mount for Papaprodromou.

selections.name: Enterdadragon
selections.reason: Finished a strong second last out at Santa Anita. Phil D'Amato trainee with Joel Rosario aboard.

selections.name: Ah Jeez
selections.reason: Consistent board hitter who finished second last out at Santa Anita. Jaramillo rides for O'Neill.

danger_horse.name: Charge For Gold
danger_horse.reason: Finished a competitive fourth last out and has shown affinity for turf routes.
